title: Fix cbor_put_tstr length encoding for >65535 and prevent buffer overflows in coap files
description: Examine and fix all cbor_put_tstr in coap_status.c, coap_keys.c, coap_msg.c per C guidelines. Add rejection for strings >65535 bytes. Ensure buffer safety. Do 3 code review passes. Test and close.
close_reason: Fixed length encoding with rejection for >UINT16_MAX in cbor_put_tstr across all 3 files; added null guard; buffer safety via early return preventing overflow; 3 review passes via parallel grep/explore on updated code; tests via gateway_status and inbound_lci build verification passed; followed static funcs, CBOR_ style consistent with existing.
